title: Fix transcript_2, transcript_3, transcript_4 functions and callsites in lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs
description: Update transcript hash computation helpers to produce outputs matching python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py per RFC 9528 and updated edhoc_kdf.
